articles.title: What are your questions about treatment of high cholesterol in younger people? - CNN
articles.description: Treating high cholesterol should start sooner, even among people in their 30s, according to new guidelines from the American College of Cardiology, the American Heart Association and other medical groups.
articles.content: Treating high cholesterol may need to start sooner, even for people in their 30s, according to new guidelines from the American College of Cardiology, the American Heart Association and other medical… [+491 chars]

articles.title: Thousands of Colorado Meatpacking Workers Are on Strike - Jacobin
articles.description: A strike in Colorado shows what happens when thousands of workers confront one of the most concentrated industries in the American economy.
